name: Okta Identity (YAML)
description: Okta-style identity as config-as-code: authorization servers with scopes, apps, groups, users, and policies wired by group assignment and membership edges.
suggestedPrompts: Assign the Salesforce app to the Engineering group
Which groups is alice a member of?
Find users who are members of a group that does not exist
Add an MFA enrollment policy applied to all employees
